completed_tasks.name: Fix app crash: lateinit languagePrefsRepo in MainActivity.onCreate before super
Fix app crash: NavigationEventDispatcherOwner not set by AppCompat 1.7.0
Fix crash on registry detail: SavedStateHandle['registryId'] null in Nav3
Sweep all VMs for same SavedStateHandle bug (Add/Edit Item, Create/Edit Registry)
Fix fetchOgMetadata NOT_FOUND: Functions region mismatch (us-central1 vs europe-west3)
Add currency handling to fetchOgMetadata (JSON-LD, itemprop, OG, inline parsing)
Fix invite crash: dotted email keys in Firestore FieldPath creating nested maps
Fix invite INTERNAL: admin.firestore.FieldPath not a constructor in admin v13
Sweep all functions for admin.firestore.X namespace access (createReservation, releaseReservation)
Harden RegistryDto.invitedUsers to Map<String, Any?> for legacy nested-map docs
Wire Create Account toggle on AuthScreen (sign-up mode with confirm password)

human_actions_pending.action: Register debug SHA-1 in Firebase Console and re-download google-services.json
human_actions_pending.context: Google OAuth sign-in requires the debug SHA-1 (EF:6C:54:89:67:45:C9:AE:FE:EE:65:D7:BC:41:F4:3C:83:1C:C0:FA) registered in Firebase Console for the Android app. Without it, Credential Manager returns 'No credentials available'.

human_actions_pending.action: Clean up legacy invitedUsers data in Firestore emulator
human_actions_pending.context: The pre-FieldPath invite bug wrote nested maps under invitedUsers. The client now handles them gracefully, but the data is malformed. Wipe via emulator UI or restart emulator to clear.

decisions.decision: Moved locale restore from MainActivity to GiftRegistryApp.onCreate()
decisions.rationale: Hilt field injection runs during super.onCreate(); accessing @Inject fields before super is UPE. Application.onCreate() runs before any activity and Hilt injects there first.

decisions.decision: Manually set ViewTreeNavigationEventDispatcherOwner on decor view in MainActivity
decisions.rationale: AppCompat 1.7.0 overrides setContentView with its own initViewTreeOwners() that doesn't include the nav event dispatcher added in activity 1.12.0. One-liner workaround until appcompat is upgraded.

decisions.decision: Created hiltViewModelWithNavArgs shared helper instead of per-screen helpers
decisions.rationale: Nav3 doesn't propagate keys to SavedStateHandle like Nav2 did. All VMs using savedStateHandle['x'] need CreationExtras seeded with DEFAULT_ARGS_KEY. Centralized helper avoids copy-paste across 4+ screens.

decisions.decision: Import FieldPath/FieldValue/Timestamp from firebase-admin/firestore subpath, not admin.firestore.X
decisions.rationale: admin.firestore.FieldPath is not populated at runtime in firebase-admin v13 when using import * as admin pattern. Subpath imports are the documented v13 pattern.

decisions.decision: Widened RegistryDto.invitedUsers to Map<String, Any?> with domain-layer coercion
decisions.rationale: Defense in depth: one malformed Firestore doc shouldn't crash the entire snapshot listener. Coerce non-boolean values to true (user was still invited).

decisions.decision: Added priceAmount and priceCurrency to OgMetadata and fetchOgMetadata response
decisions.rationale: Price field now includes currency via JSON-LD, itemprop, OG, and inline string parsing. Structured fields available for future use; display string (e.g. '459,00 RON') auto-fills the form.

next_action: Commit all uncommitted bug fixes. Then continue UAT or start Phase 5 (Web Fallback) per roadmap.
context_notes: This was a UAT/debug session — user ran the app on an emulator for the first time after Phase 4 completion and hit a cascade of runtime bugs. All bugs found and fixed. App now launches, authenticates, creates registries, adds items with OG+currency auto-fill, invites users, and the reservation Cloud Functions are patched for the admin v13 subpath import issue. Email delivery remains a Phase 6 stub. Debug logging (AddItemVM, InviteVM) was added during debugging and is still in place — low noise but can be stripped. google-services.json was modified by the user (SHA-1 registration) — do not overwrite.
